parameters.query:
SELECT
  ac.config AS ai_config,
  ar.id AS rule_id,
  ar.nom,
  ar.type_rule,
  ar.conditions,
  ar.action_type,
  ar.action_config,
  ar.priorite
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN automation_catalog cat ON cat.id = ap.automation_id
LEFT JOIN email_ai_rules ar ON ar.tenant_id = ap.tenant_id AND ar.actif = true
WHERE ap.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
  AND cat.code = 'email-ai-agent'
  AND ap.status = 'active'
ORDER BY ar.priorite ASC NULLS LAST

INSERT INTO email_incoming_logs (tenant_id, email_id, thread_id, from_address, to_address, subject, body_preview, has_attachments, classification, action, source, matched_rule_id, tokens_used, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
  {{ $json.emailId ? "'" + $json.emailId + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.threadId ? "'" + $json.threadId + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.from }}',
  '{{ $json.to }}',
  '{{ $json.subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.textPlain.substring(0, 500).replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') }}',
  {{ $json.hasAttachments }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.classification).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.action }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  {{ $json.matchedRuleId ? "'" + $json.matchedRuleId + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.tokensUsed || 0 }},
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
